stages.label: Spec Baseline
stages.description: FINAL US REGION BASELINE: 75 docs, 17 slice PRDs, 25 ADRs, 22 invariants frozen.
stages.exit: Reviewer Brief signed off; Promotion Ledger entry recorded.

stages.label: Engineering Bootstrap
stages.description: Code repo init, CI, CLAUDE.md from EHBG §13, IaC skeleton, secrets, baseline RLS migration.
stages.exit: Repo green on CI; tenant_id RLS policy enforces on every PHI table.

stages.label: Foundation Build
stages.description: Auth/Identity, RBAC, KMS-per-tenant, Audit append-only, CCR runtime, Forms Engine, AI service skeleton.
stages.exit: Invariants I-019 / I-023…I-027 verifiably enforced end-to-end.

stages.label: Slice Build
stages.description: 17 slice PRDs implemented in EHBG sprint order. Modular monolith; AI Service separated.
stages.exit: All slices ship behind feature flags with green smoke + contract tests.

stages.label: Internal Alpha
stages.description: Two-tenant smoke (Heros Health greenfield + Telecheck-Ghana pilot). Synthetic patients only.

stages.label: Pilot
stages.description: Real users, scoped cohorts. Ghana Launch Playbook v1.2 enacted. Crisis-detection drills.
stages.exit: Adverse-event reporting closed-loop; SLOs met for 30 days.

stages.label: GA Launch
stages.description: Public availability per Market Launch contract. us-east-1 primary, us-west-2 cold DR (ADR-026).
stages.exit: Launch retro published; on-call rotation steady-state.

stages.label: Scale & Iterate
stages.description: New countries via CCR, additional tenants, slice extraction from monolith as boundaries warrant.

areas.name: Medication Interaction Engine
areas.notes: PR 8 (first WRITE handler) OPENED as [CODEX-PENDING] PR #196 (commit 503090f, 2026-05-23): POST /v0/med-interaction/evaluations INSERTs the append-only interaction_engine_evaluation row under withDbRole(medication_interaction_engine_evaluator) + emits Cat A medication_interaction.engine_evaluation_completed audit in the same tx — establishes the canonical write composition for PR 9+ + all 3 SECDEF slices. Synced lib/audit.ts to AUDIT_EVENTS v5.9 (6 medication_interaction.* IDs, P-034). Validated end-to-end vs live PG16 (27 unit tests + direct-SQL INSERT/RLS-WITH-CHECK smoke). Depends on PR #195 (PR 7, migration-chain BOM + telecheck_app_role fixes) for green CI — merge #195 first. PR 7 read handler (GET /signals/:id) shipped as [CODEX-PENDING] PR #195 (Addendum 82). DB layer PRs 1-6 MERGED to telecheck-app main 5da9766. ROLE-NAME RECONCILIATION COMPLETE (Addendum 79, merge 01268d2): Option C executed via Codex two-pass dual-recommendation consult — Pass-2 caught CRITICAL non-executability defect in initial Option A recommendation (051 hotfix cannot fix chain that aborts at 047); Claude conceded Option C. 81 refs across 6 files rewritten 1:1 to bare names per spec P-034 §8; symmetric 267 insertions + 267 deletions; Codex R1 APPROVE. Fresh 000→050 chain now applies cleanly. REMOTE-CRON PR #192 obsolete + should be CLOSED. PR 7+ Fastify handlers role-name-UNBLOCKED, but trust-but-verify (Addendum 80) confirms migration 050 grants EXECUTE on the lifecycle wrappers ONLY to the slice functional roles (engine_evaluator/signal_viewer/override_recorder), never to telecheck_app_role — so handler EXECUTE remains gated on the app-role-acquisition ERR (Addendum 76, OPEN), same primitive as Crisis+Admin Sprint 2. Track 5 Infra & Ops followup DELIVERED: 000→head clean-room migration-chain CI gate shipped as PR #194 [CODEX-PENDING] (Addendum 80), validated locally (50 migrations apply clean; negative test catches the exact role-reference defect class).

See AI_Service_Rollout_24h_Status_2026-05-14.md Addendum 3.

areas.name: Repo scaffold + CI
areas.notes: EHBG §13 CLAUDE.md, ESLint/Prettier/Vitest, GitHub Actions. Addendum 113 CI-RED state RESOLVED (Addendum 136, 2026-05-24, primary-source reconciliation): all 5 CI-fix PRs merged by Evans in local Codex-enabled sessions — #215 format+lint (merged 08:29) + #211 BOM + #197 test-role + #198 RLS-count + #200 plugin-wiring — plus #193 (main tip c27638c). main CI now GREEN: open queue PR #210's 'Build, lint, typecheck, test' + benchmarks + verify-metadata + dependency-review all success. The remaining open [CODEX-PENDING] queue is the 9 handler PRs (#199/202/203/204/206/207/208/209/210), being drained locally by Evans; remote-cron loop cannot merge (no Codex/OPENAI_API_KEY → codex review 403). Addendum 138 (2026-05-25): per-member mergeability re-probe of ALL 9 (prior firings spot-checked only 2) surfaced 2 non-clean members: #204 was mergeable_state=unstable due to a REAL red 'Build, lint, typecheck, test' job (root cause = format:check/prettier failing on the 2 unformatted sweep files; reproduced locally then FIXED via prettier --write, pushed 842db7a→4464053 to the PR branch — full suite stays 2058 green, typecheck+lint+format all clean; PR stays [CODEX-PENDING], unmerged); #209 is mergeable_state=behind (head off stale base f6c5160, recommend Evans rebase onto current main c27638c before the Codex cascade). Other 7 queue PRs confirmed clean against c27638c.

areas.name: RLS baseline + migrations
areas.notes: Migrations through 007 rollback + idempotent ALTER + schema-qualified CHECK; HTTP-level verify-r1 raw tenant_id scans. Addendum 80: clean-room 000→head migration-chain gate (scripts/check-migration-chain.sh + .github/workflows/migration-chain.yml) shipped PR #194 [CODEX-PENDING] — fills the no-env-ever-applies-fresh-chain gap that let the med-interaction role-name defect reach main latently. Addendum 90: plugin-wiring stale-assertion reconciliation — the 6 admin-backend + crisis-response §1a/§1b/§1c assertions made red on main by the Sprint-2-PR-1 first-handler merges fixed in test-only PR #200 [CODEX-PENDING] (PR #193 standalone-introspection-accuracy precedent); 27/27 plugin-wiring tests green vs live PG16; same #197 migration-chain-apply CI dependency as the rest of the deferred queue. Addendum 92: durable UTF-8 BOM guard for migration SQL (scripts/check-migration-bom.mjs + check:migration-bom npm script + ci.yml first-step gate) shipped PR #211 [CODEX-PENDING] — defect-class hardening for the recurring BOM that broke the chain apply 3× (Addenda 82/86/90; instance fixes never fixed the class — Addendum 90 documents a byte-exact revert restoring the BOM); TLC-035 EOL-guard analogue. Also stripped the 6 recurring BOM files incl. rollback/049+050 which #197's '047-050' scope misses. Self-verified DB-free: 6→0 violations, 102 SQL files clean.
